abilities.description: Sharp: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} using your hound’s keen senses to track your quarry or investigate a scene, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

Ferocious: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} alongside your hound and score a hit, mark progress or take +1 momentum.

Loyal: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} in the company of your hound, add +1. On a strong hit with a match, also mark 1 tick on your bonds track.
